narrative:
Augusta (precinct in Carroll County) has 873 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.9 percentage points.
